rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee syntax with labels and expressions
Use eq/const/assign syntax for declarations and assignments
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for contract logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Use initialized state for previous-value comparisons
anti_patterns: Avoid using AADL property names as AGREE variables
Avoid using unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations
